title: coursetia glandulosa
intro: Coursetia glandulosa, also known as the glandular coursetia, is a species of plant in the family Leguminosae. It is a small shrub native to tropical Africa, known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional African medicine. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Coursetia glandulosa can be made into teas, infusions, or salves, and are often used to promote wound healing and reduce inflammation.
